comment: Audio and video read with a transcript spine — the words beside the sound, each line a moment you can jump to.
Click a transcript line to seek there; as it plays, the active line highlights and follows along.
The waveform doubles as a map of annotated moments.
Open at a shared timestamp and the player lands there, paused — no autoplay surprise.
Step between sibling tracks from the carousel in a multi-object AV exhibit.
